crossRefs.label: Remove the driver door glass regulator.
Adjust the driver door glass erection.

blocks.text: Confirm that the driver power window motor rotates smoothly and without abnormality when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

items: If the power window motor rotates and the position reaches the limit position, the 12V battery shall be disconnected immediately.

items.text: If the power window motor has a problem and does not rotate smoothly, go to step 2.
If the power window motor has a problem and does not rotate smoothly, go to step 2.
If the power window motor has no abnormality and rotates smoothly, proceed to step 2 of the pulse sensor (pulse) inspection.
If the power window motor has no abnormality and rotates smoothly, proceed to step 2 of the pulse sensor (pulse) inspection.

blocks.text: Disconnect the coupler (A). Inspect for continuity between terminal No. 4 of the power window master switch coupler and terminal No. 2 of the driver power window motor coupler, and between terminal No. 6 and terminal No. 1.

items.text: If there is continuity, proceed to Step 5.
If there is continuity, proceed to Step 5.
If there is no continuity, the cord is broken.
If there is no continuity, the cord is broken.

blocks.text: Remove the driver door glass regulator. Confirm that the driver power window motor (A) rotates smoothly without abnormality when battery voltage is applied between each terminal.

refs.label: Remove the driver door glass regulator.

items: If the power window motor rotates and the position reaches the limit position, the 12V battery shall be disconnected immediately.

items.text: Driver Power Window If the motor does not rotate smoothly due to a problem with the motor, the motor is defective, Replace driver door glass regulator The following is a list of the most common problems with the

Driver Power Window If the motor does not rotate smoothly due to a problem with the motor, the motor is defective, Replace driver door glass regulator The following is a list of the most common problems with the

refs.label: Adjust the driver door glass erection.

items.text: If the power window motor rotates smoothly with no abnormalities, Adjust the driver door glass erection. The following is a list of the most common problems with the

refs.label: Adjust the driver door glass erection.

blocks.text: Install the driver door glass regulator. Check continuity between the No. 4 terminal of the driver power window motor coupler and body ground. Connect the coupler.

refs.label: Install the driver door glass regulator.

items.text: If there is continuity, proceed to Step 4.
If there is continuity, proceed to Step 4.
If there is no continuity, the cord is broken.
If there is no continuity, the cord is broken.

blocks.text: Measure the voltage between each terminal of the power window master switch during motor rotation. *: To check the motor pulse, it is necessary to inspect the inspection terminal with an oscilloscope and check the output waveform.

rows.text: Approx. 0V Pulse waveform of approx. 5 V*.

items.text: If the inspection result of the input inspection is normal, Replace power window master switch The following is a list of the most common problems with the
If the inspection result of the input inspection is normal, Replace power window master switch The following is a list of the most common problems with the
If the input inspection result is abnormal, the pulse sensor is defective, Replace driver door glass regulator The following is a list of the most common problems with the
If the input inspection result is abnormal, the pulse sensor is defective, Replace driver door glass regulator The following is a list of the most common problems with the

blocks.text: Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.

items: Reset and learn the power window when the following operations are performed: (If auto-open/auto-close operation still occurs after the reset, perform the reset again. (If auto-open/auto-close operation still occurs after resetting, reset again.)
When the power window master switch or driver door glass regulator is replaced.
When the driver door glass regulator is detached, the door glass is detached, or the glass run channel is detached.
